name: SSO-OIDC RBAC
description: Advanced OIDC authentication with role-based library access control
overview: OpenID Connect SSO with role-to-library mapping, multi-provider support, and admin UI.

versions.changelog: Fix admin/RBAC permissions not persisting: apply role mappings after AuthenticateDirect so Jellyfin cannot overwrite them; add post-update verification with retry
Fix OidcAuthProvider not registered with Jellyfin DI; fix new user creation crashing on ChangePassword; fix MaxParentalRating defaulting to 0; fix credential storage missing ServerId
